components.author: OWASP Foundation
components.name: cyclonedx-maven-plugin
components.description: CycloneDX Maven plugin

component.name: ike-doc
component.description: Documentation for the IkeFoundation starter set. The comprehensive Koncept glossary renders from the koncepts.yml the change-set module extracts from the loaded store.

components.name: ike-changeset
components.description: The released form of the IkeFoundation knowledge set: ike:knowledge-export replays the ledger and attaches the protobuf change set (classifier: changeset). A starter set is exactly this artifact applied to an empty base.

components.name: ike-terms
components.description: The IkeFoundation ledger: declared stamps inline, edits under each, authored with the chronology builders. Replay is verified over the in-memory store; the change-set module consumes this ledger.

components.name: entity
components.description: Tinkar-core is a java software project that aims to provides a reference implementation for the open-source HL7 Tinkar informational Ballot. Tinkar and its underlining data model serves as a self-describing terminology model that can be used to harmonize other standards based models.

components.description: Tinkar-core is a java software project that aims to provides a reference implementation for the open-source HL7 Tinkar informational Ballot. components.name: tinkar-schema
components.description: Standard parent POM for IKE Network projects. Inheriting this POM provides build conventions (Java 25 compiler, test harness, GPG signing, AsciiDoc documentation pipeline) from the ike-platform reactor root and centralized dependency version management declared inline. Declares ike-doc-maven-plugin (from network.ike.docs) with extensions=true to provide the ike-doc custom packaging type to external doc projects.

components.name: caffeine
components.description: A high performance caching library

components.name: jspecify
components.description: An artifact of well-named and well-specified annotations to power static analysis checks

components.name: error_prone_annotations
components.description: Error Prone is a static analysis tool for Java that catches common programming mistakes at compile-time.

components.name: protobuf-java
components.description: The General Parent that helps to define the build processes that should be used across projects, regardless of. Package type. This is versioned and if you want to use a different version of the pom, you can simply change the parent version and it will adjust all of the properties being used throughout, as the properties and plugins will be inherited by subprojects.

components.name: jgrapht-core
components.description: A Java class library for graph-theory data structures and algorithms.

components.name: eclipse-collections-api
components.description: Eclipse Collections is a collections framework for Java. It has JDK-compatible List, Set and Map implementations with a rich API and set of utility classes that work with any JDK compatible Collections, Arrays, Maps or Strings. The iteration protocol was inspired by the Smalltalk collection framework.

components.name: eclipse-collections
components.description: Eclipse Collections is a collections framework for Java. The iteration protocol was inspired by the Smalltalk collection framework.

components.name: ike-knowledge-provider
components.description: Chronology-store implementation of the IKE knowledge-pipeline SPI: ServiceLoader providers for export, assembly, bindings, and verification, composing the engine's capability libraries behind the stable IKE contract.

components.name: ike-knowledge-spi
components.description: Zero-dependency contract module for the IKE knowledge pipeline: ServiceLoader service interfaces (assemble, export, bindings, verify), the ViewSpec dimension vocabulary, and the properties codec that crosses the forked-JVM execution seam.

components.name: roaringbitmap
components.description: Roaring bitmaps are compressed bitmaps (also called bitsets) which tend to outperform conventional compressed bitmaps such as WAH or Concise.
